description: Product Description Intensive Repair Shampoo and Conditioner work immediately to help repair the hair surface while deeply nourishing the core to reconstruct it from within. Every time you use it, your hair is repaired, strong and beautiful. Deeply nourishes and helps to repair even the most damaged hair* *Refers to the signs of damage.
